---
name: Rule proposal
about: Propose a new global or language-specific engineering rule
title: "[Rule]: "
labels: enhancement, rules
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What agent behavior or engineering gap should this rule improve?

## Proposed Rule

Write the proposed rule in clear, actionable language.

## Scope

Where should it apply?

- [ ] Global `AGENTS.md`
- [ ] `rules/common/`
- [ ] `rules/web/`
- [ ] `rules/typescript/`
- [ ] `rules/design/`
- [ ] Other:

## Safety and Compatibility

Does this weaken any existing safety, testing, design, or security rule?

## Examples

Add a short example if useful.
